metadata.publisher: Government of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia (Ministry of Agriculture)
metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Agriculture, Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia
metadata.source_note: Productive Safety Net Programme Phase IV Programme Implementation Manual (PIM), the final version of 14 December 2014 issued by the Ministry of Agriculture. The programme's original USAID-hosted copy is dead; this capture is the Government-of-Ethiopia mirror served from srbofed.gov.et (the Southern Region Bureau of Finance and Economic Development), byte-verified against the SOUTHMOD/ETMOD harness copy. A 344-page text-embedded PDF, extracted as a single block with no OCR. Grounds the transfer benchmark, verbatim: the daily cash wage rate is "calculated on the basis of the cost of buying 3kg of cereal and 0.8 kg of pulses per day (15kg of cereal and 4kg of pulses per person per month)", and "The monthly food transfer is 15kg of cereal and 4kg of pulses." Flag: captured from the GoE srbofed.gov.et mirror because the original USAID-hosted copy is no longer available.
metadata.title: Productive Safety Net Programme Phase IV Programme Implementation Manual (Ministry of Agriculture, 2014) - transfer benchmark 3kg cereal + 0.8kg pulses/day (15kg cereal + 4kg pulses/person/month)
